headline: When Trump Cuts Tariffs on Farm and Construction Equipment, These 5 Stocks Win Big
summary: The Trump administration is about to hand five equipment makers a margin gift, and the window to position is closing fast. I’ve been tracking this tariff-relief setup across the industrial complex for months, and per the Marketplace Morning Report’s Nova Safo, tariffs on imported agricultural and manufacturing machinery containing steel, aluminum, and copper drop from ... headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Deere, Raises Price Target to $590
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Deere (NYSE:DE) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $560 to $590.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Deere, Raises Price Target to $590
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Deere (NYSE:DE) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $560 to $590.

headline: Deere recovers $272M in tariff refunds
summary: The farm equipment manufacturer still expects about $900 million in net tariff costs for the current fiscal year, executives said.
